accept(T) - Method in interface minum.utils.ThrowingConsumer
 
ActionQueue - Class in minum.utils
This class provides the ability to pop items into a queue thread-safely and know they'll happen later.
ActionQueue(String, Context) - Constructor for class minum.utils.ActionQueue
See the ActionQueue description for more detail.

This class exists to properly kill off multiple action queues

Returns the raw bytes of this HTTP message's body

Return the bytes of this request body by its key.

assertEqualByteArray(byte[], byte[]) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
Compares two byte arrays for equality
assertEquals(List<T>, List<T>) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
asserts that two lists are equal in value and order.
assertEquals(List<T>, List<T>, String) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
asserts that two lists are equal in value and order.
assertEquals(T, T) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
A helper for testing - assert two generics are equal.
assertEqualsDisregardOrder(List<? extends CharSequence>, List<? extends CharSequence>) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
asserts two lists are equal, ignoring the order.
assertFalse(boolean) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
 
assertThrows(Class<T>, String, ThrowingRunnable<TESTING>) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
 
assertThrows(Class<T>, ThrowingRunnable<TESTING>) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
assert that a particular chunk of code throws a particular exception.
assertTrue(boolean) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
 
assertTrue(boolean, String) - Static method in class minum.testing.TestFramework
Assert that something is true, and show a message if it fails.
asStream() - Method in class minum.utils.ConcurrentSet
 
asStream(boolean) - Method in class minum.utils.ConcurrentSet
 
asString() - Method in class minum.web.Body
Return the entire raw contents of the body of this request, as a string.
asString(String) - Method in class minum.web.Body
Return the body as a string, presuming that the Request body data is organized as key-value pairs.
ASYNC_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class minum.logging.LoggingLevel
Represents an error that occurs in a separate thread, so that we are not able to catch it bubbling up

Returns the value of the attributes record component.

AUDIT - Enum constant in enum class minum.logging.LoggingLevel

bytesToHex(byte[]) - Static method in class minum.utils.CryptoUtils

This uses a [ConcurrentHashMap] as its base.
ConcurrentSet() - Constructor for class minum.utils.ConcurrentSet
 
Config - Class in minum
If the user has no configuration file, this class contains code that will run to assist them.
Constants - Class in minum
Very important system design decisions are made here.
Constants() - Constructor for class minum.Constants
 
contentLength() - Method in class minum.web.Headers
Given the list of headers, find the one with the length of the body of the POST and return that value as an integer.
contentType() - Method in class minum.web.Headers
Gets the one content-type header, or returns an empty string
Context - Class in minum
Holds important system-wide data and methods.
Context(ExecutorService, Constants, FullSystem) - Constructor for class minum.Context
In order to avoid statics or singletons allow certain objects to be widely available, we'll store them in this class.
convertLoggingStringsToEnums(List<String>) - Static method in class minum.logging.Logger
Given a list of strings representing logging levels, convert it to a list of enums.
createPasswordHash(String, String) - Static method in class minum.utils.CryptoUtils
Hash the input string with the provided PBKDF2 algorithm, and return a string representation Note that the PBKDF2WithHmacSHA1 algorithm is specifically designed to take a long time, to slow down an attacker.
createSslSocketWithSpecificKeystore(int, URL, String) - Method in class minum.web.WebEngine
Create an SSL Socket using a specified keystore
CryptoUtils - Class in minum.utils
Handy helpers for dealing with cryptographic functions
CryptoUtils() - Constructor for class minum.utils.CryptoUtils

Db<T extends DbData<?>> - Class in minum.database
This allows us to run some disk-persistence operations more consistently on any data that extends from DbData
Db(Path, Context, T) - Constructor for class minum.database.Db
Constructs a disk-persistence class well-suited for your data.
DB_DIRECTORY - Variable in class minum.Constants
This is the root directory of our database

Extend from this class to create a data value that is intended to be stored in the database.

ExtendedExecutor - Class in minum.utils
This lets us capture the stack traces thrown in a thread, which the typical Executor does not.
ExtendedExecutor(int, int, long, TimeUnit, BlockingQueue<Runnable>, ThreadFactory) - Constructor for class minum.utils.ExtendedExecutor
 
extractData(InputStream, Headers) - Method in class minum.web.BodyProcessor
read the body if one exists
There are really only two ways to read the body.
extractHeaderInformation(InputStream) - Method in class minum.web.Headers
Loops through reading text lines from the socket wrapper, returning a list of what it has found when it hits an empty line.
extractStartLine(String) - Method in class minum.web.StartLine
Given the string value of a startline (like GET /hello HTTP/1.1) validate and extract the values for our use.
extractStatusLine(String) - Static method in record class minum.web.StatusLine
Parses a string value of a status line from an HTTP server.

Makes it a bit easier to find a value in a string using a Regex.
findFirstMessageThatContains(String) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
Looks back through the last 3 log messages for one that contains the provided value.
findFirstMessageThatContains(String, int) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
Provides an ability to search over the recent past log messages, case-insensitively.

FullSystem - Class in minum
This class is responsible for kicking off the entire system.

HTML - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
htmlOk(String) - Static method in record class minum.web.Response
If you are returning HTML text with a 200 ok, this is a helper that lets you skip some of the boilerplate.
htmlOk(String, List<String>) - Static method in record class minum.web.Response
If you are returning HTML text with a 200 ok, this is a helper that lets you skip some of the boilerplate.
HtmlParseNode - Record Class in minum.htmlparsing
These nodes represent the types of things we may encounter when parsing an HTML string, which for our purposes is just the types in ParseNodeType.
HtmlParseNode(ParseNodeType, TagInfo, List<HtmlParseNode>, String) - Constructor for record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
Creates an instance of a HtmlParseNode record class.
HtmlParser - Class in minum.htmlparsing
This class converts HTML strings to HTML object trees.
HtmlParser() - Constructor for class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParser

initialize() - Method in class minum.utils.ActionQueue

This is the expected entry-point for most users.
innerContent() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
Returns the value of the innerContent record component.
innerText() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
If the element you're looking at has just one inner content item, and it's a CHARACTERS element, return it.
INPUT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
InputStreamUtils - Class in minum.web
Handy helpful utilities for working with input streams.
InputStreamUtils(Context) - Constructor for class minum.web.InputStreamUtils
 
INS - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
InvariantException - Exception Class in minum.utils
An exception specific to our invariants.
InvariantException(String) - Constructor for exception class minum.utils.InvariantException
 
Invariants - Class in minum.utils
Utilities for asserting invariants within the code.
Invariants() - Constructor for class minum.utils.Invariants
 
IS_THE_BRIG_ENABLED - Variable in class minum.Constants
TheBrig is what puts client ip's in jail, if we feel they are attacking us.
isClientLookingForVulnerabilities(String) - Method in class minum.security.UnderInvestigation
Check for the kinds of error messages we usually see when an attacker is trying their shenanigans on us.
isInJail(String) - Method in class minum.security.TheBrig
 
isLookingForSuspiciousPaths(String) - Method in class minum.security.UnderInvestigation
If the client is looking for paths like owa/auth/login.aspx, it means they are probably some low-effort script scouring the web.
ISocketWrapper - Interface in minum.web
This is the public interface to ISocketWrapper, whose purpose is to make our lives easier when working with Socket.
isolatedPath() - Method in record class minum.web.StartLine.PathDetails
Returns the value of the isolatedPath record component.
isThereIsABody(Headers) - Method in class minum.web.WebFramework
Determine whether the headers in this HTTP message indicate that a body is available to read
isVoidElement - Variable in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName

KEYSTORE_PASSWORD - Variable in class minum.Constants
The password of the keystore, used for TLS
KEYSTORE_PATH - Variable in class minum.Constants
The path to the keystore, required for encrypted TLS communication
killAllQueues() - Method in class minum.utils.ActionQueueKiller
Systematically stops and kills all the action queues that have been instantiated in this call tree.

LOG_LEVELS - Variable in class minum.Constants
The default logging levels
logAsyncError(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in interface minum.logging.ILogger
Use this particularly for those cases where we want to log an error but we're stuck inside an asynchronous piece of code, for example, anything unexpectedly bad that happens in ActionQueue
logAsyncError(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
logAsyncError(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
 
logAudit(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in interface minum.logging.ILogger
This is for logging business-related topics
logAudit(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
logAudit(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
 
logDebug(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in interface minum.logging.ILogger
For minum.logging data that is helpful to debugging a running system.
logDebug(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
logDebug(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
 
logger() - Method in record class minum.web.SetOfSws
Returns the value of the logger record component.
Logger - Class in minum.logging
Implementation of ILogger
Logger(LoggingContext) - Constructor for class minum.logging.Logger
This constructor initializes an ActionQueue to handle log messages.
Logger(LoggingContext, String) - Constructor for class minum.logging.Logger
 
loggerPrinter - Variable in class minum.logging.Logger
The ActionQueue that handles all our messages thread-safely by taking them off the top of a queue.
LoggingActionQueue - Class in minum.logging
This class is very similar to ActionQueue but is focused on Logging.
LoggingActionQueue(String, ExecutorService, Constants) - Constructor for class minum.logging.LoggingActionQueue
 
LoggingContext - Class in minum.logging
Holds important system-wide data and methods for logging
LoggingContext(ExecutorService, Constants) - Constructor for class minum.logging.LoggingContext
In order to avoid statics or singletons allow certain objects to be widely available, we'll store them in this class.
LoggingLevel - Enum Class in minum.logging
An enumeration of the levels of logging our system provides.
logHelper(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>, LoggingLevel) - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
A helper method to reduce duplication
logTrace(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in interface minum.logging.ILogger
this is similar to ILogger.logDebug(ThrowingSupplier) except that it gets run *A LOT*, which can spam up the logs.
logTrace(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
logTrace(ThrowingSupplier<String, Exception>) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
 
LRUCache<T> - Class in minum.utils
A simple Least-Recently Used Cache See LRU

M

make(Constants) - Static method in class minum.logging.Logger
Build a logger.
make(Context, InputStreamUtils) - Static method in class minum.web.Headers
Run this command to build a Headers object.
makeDirectory(ILogger, Path) - Static method in class minum.utils.FileUtils
Creates a directory if it doesn't already exist.
makeExecutorService(Constants) - Static method in class minum.utils.ExtendedExecutor
 
makePrimaryHttpHandler() - Method in class minum.web.WebFramework
This is the brains of how the server responds to web clients.
MAP - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
MARK - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
MAX_HEADERS_COUNT - Variable in class minum.Constants
We'll only read this many headers off a message.
MAX_QUERY_STRING_KEYS_COUNT - Variable in class minum.Constants
A user can only provide up to this many query string keys
MAX_READ_LINE_SIZE_BYTES - Variable in class minum.Constants
The most bytes we'll read as a single line
MAX_READ_SIZE_BYTES - Variable in class minum.Constants
this is the most bytes we'll read from a socket
MAX_SIZE_DATA_RETURNED_IN_EXCEPTION - Static variable in class minum.web.BodyProcessor
When parsing fails, we would like to send the raw text back to the user so the development team can determine why parsing went awry.
MAX_TOKENIZER_PARTITIONS - Variable in class minum.Constants
We have a tokenizer that can split a string into partitions.
MENU - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
META - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
METER - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
minum - package minum
Minum is a web library with all the components needed to build a web application, including a web server and a database.
minum.database - package minum.database
These are the utilties needed to enable a database for the application.
minum.exceptions - package minum.exceptions
Custom exceptions
minum.htmlparsing - package minum.htmlparsing
provides the ability to convert HTML text into an object tree
minum.logging - package minum.logging
Utilities for logging status of the system at runtime
minum.security - package minum.security
Protects against a harsh internet environment
minum.templating - package minum.templating
templating abilities, mostly for html but useful for any situation requiring quick substitution inside text.
minum.testing - package minum.testing
Automated software testing
minum.utils - package minum.utils
Generally-useful utilities.
minum.web - package minum.web
Code and data for HTTP serving
MOST_COOKIES_WELL_LOOK_THROUGH - Variable in class minum.Constants
Totally nonsense if we find more than this many matches of cookies in the headers.
mustBeFalse(boolean, String) - Static method in class minum.utils.Invariants
Specify something which must be false
mustBeTrue(boolean, String) - Static method in class minum.utils.Invariants
Specify something which must be true.
mustNotBeNull(T) - Static method in class minum.utils.Invariants
specifies that the parameter must be not null.
MyThread - Class in minum.utils
This class exists just to avoid needing to handle the exception when I use a regular Thread.sleep()
MyThread() - Constructor for class minum.utils.MyThread
 

N

nameOfSet() - Method in record class minum.web.SetOfSws
Returns the value of the nameOfSet record component.
NAV - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
NONE - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.StartLine.Verb
 
NONE - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.WebEngine.HttpVersion
 
NOSCRIPT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
NULL - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
Used to indicate that no tag was found, to avoid use of null
NULL - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.StatusLine.StatusCode
The null object, meant to represent "no status code"

O

OBJECT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
OL - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
ONE_DOT_ONE - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.WebEngine.HttpVersion
 
ONE_DOT_ZERO - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.WebEngine.HttpVersion
 
OPTGROUP - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
OPTION - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
OUTPUT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 

P

P - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
PARAM - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
parse(String) - Method in class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParser
Given any HTML input, scan through and generate a tree of HTML nodes.
parseMultiform(byte[], String) - Method in class minum.web.BodyProcessor
Extract multipart/form data from a body.
ParseNodeType - Enum Class in minum.htmlparsing
The different kinds of things in an HTML document.
parseUrlEncodedForm(String) - Method in class minum.web.BodyProcessor
Parse data formatted by application/x-www-form-urlencoded See ...
ParsingException - Exception Class in minum.htmlparsing
Thrown If a failure takes place during parsing in any of the parsing code of the framework.
ParsingException(String) - Constructor for exception class minum.htmlparsing.ParsingException
This constructor allows you to provide a text message for insight into what exceptional situation took place.
ParsingException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class minum.htmlparsing.ParsingException
This constructor allows you to provide a text message for insight into what exceptional situation took place.
PathDetails(String, String, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for record class minum.web.StartLine.PathDetails
Creates an instance of a PathDetails record class.
POST - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.StartLine.Verb
 
PRE - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
print() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
This method traverses the tree from this node downwards, adding the text content as it goes.
printf(String, Object...) - Static method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 

Q

Q - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
queryString() - Method in record class minum.web.StartLine.PathDetails
Returns the value of the queryString record component.
queryString() - Method in class minum.web.StartLine
Returns a map of the key-value pairs in the URL, for example in http://foo.com?name=alice you have a key of name and a value of alice.

R

rawQueryString() - Method in record class minum.web.StartLine.PathDetails
Returns the value of the rawQueryString record component.
rawValue() - Method in record class minum.web.StatusLine
Returns the value of the rawValue record component.
read(int, InputStream) - Method in class minum.web.InputStreamUtils
Reads "lengthToRead" bytes from the input stream
readChunkedEncoding(InputStream) - Method in class minum.web.InputStreamUtils
reads following the algorithm for transfer-encoding: chunked.
readFile(String) - Static method in class minum.utils.FileUtils
Read a file as a string from the resources/ directory.
readLine(InputStream) - Method in class minum.web.InputStreamUtils
Reads a line of text, stopping when reading a newline.
readTemplate(String) - Static method in class minum.utils.FileUtils
Read a file as a string from the resources/templates directory.
readUntilEOF(InputStream) - Method in class minum.web.InputStreamUtils
Read from the socket until it returns an EOF indicator (that is, -1) Note: this *will block* until it gets to that EOF.
REDIRECT_TO_SECURE - Variable in class minum.Constants
If true, any requests to the non-encrypted port will receive a redirect to the secure schema.
redirectTo(String) - Static method in record class minum.web.Response
 
RegexUtils - Class in minum.testing
Handy helpers to make regular expression marginally easier / more efficient, etc.
registerPartialPath(StartLine.Verb, String, Function<Request, Response>) - Method in class minum.web.WebFramework
Similar to registerPath(StartLine.Verb, String, Function) except that the paths registered here may be partially matched.
registerPath(StartLine.Verb, String, Function<Request, Response>) - Method in class minum.web.WebFramework
Add a new handler in the web application for a combination of a StartLine.Verb, a path, and then provide the code to handle a request.
registerStaticFiles(StaticFilesCache) - Method in class minum.web.WebFramework
register a StaticFilesCache to use for getting and caching static values
remoteRequester() - Method in record class minum.web.Request
Returns the value of the remoteRequester record component.
remove(ISocketWrapper) - Method in record class minum.web.SetOfSws
 
remove(T) - Method in class minum.utils.ConcurrentSet
 
removeEldestEntry(Map.Entry<String, T>) - Method in class minum.utils.LRUCache
 
removeMyRecord(ISocketWrapper) - Method in class minum.web.Server
When we first create a SocketWrapper in Server, we provide it a reference back to this object, so that it can call this command.
removeShutdownHook() - Method in class minum.FullSystem
 
render(Map<String, String>) - Method in record class minum.templating.TemplateSection
 
renderTemplate(Map<String, String>) - Method in class minum.templating.TemplateProcessor
Given a map of key names -> value, render a template.
Request - Record Class in minum.web
An HTTP request.
Request(Headers, StartLine, Body, String) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Request
Creates an instance of a Request record class.
Response - Record Class in minum.web
Represents an HTTP response.
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, byte[]) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, byte[], List<String>) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, String) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, String, List<String>) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, List<String>) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, List<String>, byte[]) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
Creates an instance of a Response record class.
Response(StatusLine.StatusCode, List<String>, String) - Constructor for record class minum.web.Response
 
RP - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
RT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
RUBY - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
run() - Method in class minum.utils.RunnableWithDescription
 
run() - Method in interface minum.utils.ThrowingRunnable
 
RunnableWithDescription<E extends Throwable> - Class in minum.utils
This class is to improve maintainability in the system.
RunnableWithDescription(ThrowingRunnable<E>, String) - Constructor for class minum.utils.RunnableWithDescription
 

S

S - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
safeAttr(String) - Static method in class minum.utils.StringUtils
Replace dangerous text that would go inside an HTML attribute.
safeHtml(String) - Static method in class minum.utils.StringUtils
Returns text that has three symbols replaced - the less-than, greater-than, and ampersand.
SAMP - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SCRIPT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
searchOne(List<HtmlParseNode>, TagName, Map<String, String>) - Method in class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParser
Searches the node tree.
searchOne(TagName, Map<String, String>) - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
This searches for a single node in the HTML.
SECTION - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SECURE_SERVER_PORT - Variable in class minum.Constants
The port for our encrypted server
SELECT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
send(byte[]) - Method in interface minum.web.ISocketWrapper
 
send(byte[]) - Method in class minum.web.SocketWrapper
 
send(String) - Method in interface minum.web.ISocketWrapper
 
send(String) - Method in class minum.web.SocketWrapper
 
sendHttpLine(String) - Method in interface minum.web.ISocketWrapper
 
sendHttpLine(String) - Method in class minum.web.SocketWrapper
 
sendToJail(String, long) - Method in class minum.security.TheBrig
Put a client in jail for some infraction, for a specified time.
serialize() - Method in class minum.database.DbData
Serializes this object into a string representation.
serializeHelper(Object...) - Method in class minum.database.DbData
This is a helper that will encode the values you give it in preparation for storage in a dataase file.
Server - Class in minum.web
The purpose here is to make it marginally easier to work with a ServerSocket.
Server(ServerSocket, Context, String, TheBrig) - Constructor for class minum.web.Server
 
SERVER_PORT - Variable in class minum.Constants
The port for our regular, non-encrypted server
setIndex(long) - Method in class minum.database.DbData
 
setLogger(ILogger) - Method in class minum.Context
 
setLogger(ILogger) - Method in class minum.logging.LoggingContext
 
SetOfSws - Record Class in minum.web
This is a data structure of the live set of ISocketWrapper in our system.
SetOfSws(ConcurrentSet<ISocketWrapper>, ILogger, String) - Constructor for record class minum.web.SetOfSws
Creates an instance of a SetOfSws record class.
shortDescription - Variable in enum class minum.web.StatusLine.StatusCode
 
showWhiteSpace(String) - Static method in class minum.logging.Logger
Given a string that may have whitespace chars, render it in a way we can see
size() - Method in class minum.utils.ConcurrentSet
 
sleep(long) - Static method in class minum.utils.MyThread
Same behavior as Thread.sleep(long), but wrapped so that it prints the exception's stacktrace instead of letting it bubble up.
SMALL - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SOCKET_TIMEOUT_MILLIS - Variable in class minum.Constants
How long will we let a socket live before we crash it closed? See Socket.setSoTimeout(int)
SocketWrapper - Class in minum.web
This wraps Sockets to make them more particular to our use case
SocketWrapper(Socket, ILogger, int) - Constructor for class minum.web.SocketWrapper
Constructor
SocketWrapper(Socket, Server, ILogger, int) - Constructor for class minum.web.SocketWrapper
 
SOURCE - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SPAN - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
split(byte[], String) - Method in class minum.web.BodyProcessor
Given a multipart-formatted data, return a list of byte arrays between the boundary values
stackTraceToString(StackTraceElement[]) - Static method in class minum.utils.StacktraceUtils
Converts an array of StackTraceElement to a single string, joining them with a semicolon as delimiter.
stackTraceToString(Throwable) - Static method in class minum.utils.StacktraceUtils
grabs the stacktrace out of a Throwable as a string
StacktraceUtils - Class in minum.utils
Helper functions for manipulating stack traces.
StacktraceUtils() - Constructor for class minum.utils.StacktraceUtils
 
start() - Method in class minum.FullSystem
Kicks off the various bits and pieces.
start(ExecutorService, ThrowingConsumer<ISocketWrapper, IOException>) - Method in class minum.web.Server
This is the infinite loop running inside the basic socket server code.
START_TIME - Variable in class minum.Constants
This value is the result of running System.currentTimeMillis() when this class gets instantiated, and that is done at the very beginning.
startClient(Server) - Method in class minum.web.WebEngine
Create a client ISocketWrapper connected to the running host server
startLine() - Method in record class minum.web.Request
Returns the value of the startLine record component.
StartLine - Class in minum.web
This class holds data and methods for dealing with the "start line" in an HTTP request.
StartLine(StartLine.Verb, StartLine.PathDetails, WebEngine.HttpVersion, String, Context) - Constructor for class minum.web.StartLine
 
StartLine.PathDetails - Record Class in minum.web
Some essential characteristics of the path portion of the start line
StartLine.Verb - Enum Class in minum.web
These are the HTTP Verbs we handle
startServer(ExecutorService) - Method in class minum.web.WebEngine
Create a listening server with no handler.
startServer(ExecutorService, ThrowingConsumer<ISocketWrapper, IOException>) - Method in class minum.web.WebEngine
 
startSslServer(ExecutorService, ThrowingConsumer<ISocketWrapper, IOException>) - Method in class minum.web.WebEngine
 
startTimer() - Method in class minum.testing.StopwatchUtils
 
STATIC_FILES_DIRECTORY - Static variable in class minum.web.StaticFilesCache
in the resources, where we store our static files, like jpegs, css files, scripts
StaticFilesCache - Class in minum.web
This is a store of data for any static data we are sending to the client.
StaticFilesCache(ILogger) - Constructor for class minum.web.StaticFilesCache
 
status() - Method in record class minum.web.StatusLine
Returns the value of the status record component.
statusCode() - Method in record class minum.web.Response
Returns the value of the statusCode record component.
StatusLine - Record Class in minum.web
This class represents the text that is sent back in a Response
StatusLine(StatusLine.StatusCode, WebEngine.HttpVersion, String) - Constructor for record class minum.web.StatusLine
Creates an instance of a StatusLine record class.
StatusLine.StatusCode - Enum Class in minum.web
See see Status Codes
stop() - Method in interface minum.logging.ILogger
The logger has to stand apart from the rest of the system, or else we'll have circular dependencies.
stop() - Method in class minum.logging.Logger
 
stop() - Method in class minum.logging.LoggingActionQueue
This will prevent any new actions being queued (by setting the stop flag to true and thus causing an exception to be thrown when a call is made to [enqueue]) and will block until the queue is empty.
stop() - Method in class minum.security.TheBrig
Kills the infinite loop running inside this class.
stop() - Method in class minum.utils.ActionQueue
This will prevent any new actions being queued (by setting the stop flag to true and thus causing an exception to be thrown when a call is made to [enqueue]) and will block until the queue is empty.
stop(int, int) - Method in class minum.logging.LoggingActionQueue
Stops the action queue
stop(int, int) - Method in class minum.utils.ActionQueue
Stops the action queue
stopAllServers() - Method in record class minum.web.SetOfSws
 
stopTimer() - Method in class minum.testing.StopwatchUtils
 
StopwatchUtils - Class in minum.testing
This class provides some tools for running a virtual stopwatch while code is running, to examine code speed.
StopwatchUtils() - Constructor for class minum.testing.StopwatchUtils
 
StringUtils - Class in minum.utils
Some helper methods for Strings.
STRONG - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
STYLE - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SUB - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
subString() - Method in record class minum.templating.TemplateSection
Returns the value of the subString record component.
SUMMARY - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SUP - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
SUSPICIOUS_ERRORS - Variable in class minum.Constants
These are a list of error messages that often indicate unusual behavior, maybe an attacker
SUSPICIOUS_PATHS - Variable in class minum.Constants
These are a list of paths that often indicate unusual behavior, maybe an attacker

T

TABLE - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
tagInfo() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
Returns the value of the tagInfo record component.
TagInfo - Record Class in minum.htmlparsing
Represents a tag.
TagInfo(TagName, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for record class minum.htmlparsing.TagInfo
Creates an instance of a TagInfo record class.
tagName() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.TagInfo
Returns the value of the tagName record component.
TagName - Enum Class in minum.htmlparsing
Possible tag names per the W3C HTML spec.
TBODY - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TD - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TemplateProcessor - Class in minum.templating
In order to perform speedy template rendering, it is necessary to get the template converted into this class.
TemplateRenderException - Exception Class in minum.templating
This exception is thrown when we try to render a string template but fail to include a key for one of the key values - that is, if the template is "hello {foo}", and our map doesn't include a value for foo, this exception will get thrown.
TemplateRenderException(String) - Constructor for exception class minum.templating.TemplateRenderException
 
TemplateSection - Record Class in minum.templating
Represents one item in the list that will eventually be cooked up into a fully-rendered string.
TemplateSection(String, String) - Constructor for record class minum.templating.TemplateSection
Creates an instance of a TemplateSection record class.
test(String) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
A helper function to log a test title prefixed with "TEST:"
Also collects data about the previously-run test
TestFailureException - Exception Class in minum.testing
Thrown when a test fails
TestFailureException(String) - Constructor for exception class minum.testing.TestFailureException
This constructor allows you to provide a text message for insight into what exceptional situation took place.
TestFramework - Class in minum.testing
These are utility functions for basic automated testing.
TestLogger - Class in minum.testing
This implementation of Logger has a few extra functions that only apply to tests, like TestLogger.test(String)
TestLogger(LoggingContext, String) - Constructor for class minum.testing.TestLogger
See TestLogger
testSuite(String) - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
An organizational tool - indicates in the test report that the following tests are within this testing suite
TEXTAREA - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
textContent() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
Returns the value of the textContent record component.
TFOOT - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TH - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
THEAD - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TheBrig - Class in minum.security
This class is responsible for monitoring the inmates who have misbehaved in our system.
TheBrig(int, Context) - Constructor for class minum.security.TheBrig
 
TheBrig(Context) - Constructor for class minum.security.TheBrig
In this class we create a thread that runs throughout the lifetime of the application, in an infinite loop removing keys from the list under consideration.
ThrowingConsumer<T,E extends Throwable> - Interface in minum.utils
This exists so that we are able to slightly better manage exceptions in a highly threaded system.
ThrowingRunnable<E extends Throwable> - Interface in minum.utils
This exists so that we are able to slightly better manage exceptions in a highly threaded system.
throwingRunnableWrapper(ThrowingRunnable<Exception>, ILogger) - Static method in interface minum.utils.ThrowingRunnable
 
ThrowingSupplier<T,E extends Throwable> - Interface in minum.utils
This exists so that we are able to slightly better manage exceptions in a highly threaded system.
TIME - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TimeUtils - Class in minum.utils
 
TimeUtils() - Constructor for class minum.utils.TimeUtils
 
TITLE - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName

Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.TagInfo
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class minum.logging.LoggingActionQueue
 
toString() - Method in record class minum.templating.TemplateSection
Returns a string representation of this record class.

toString() - Method in class minum.utils.RunnableWithDescription
 
toString() - Method in record class minum.web.Request
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class minum.web.Response
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class minum.web.Server
 
toString() - Method in record class minum.web.SetOfSws
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class minum.web.SocketWrapper
Note that since we are indicating just the remote address as the unique value, in cases like tests where we are operating as sometimes server or client, you might see the server as the remote.
toString() - Method in record class minum.web.StartLine.PathDetails
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class minum.web.StartLine
 
toString() - Method in record class minum.web.StatusLine
Returns a string representation of this record class.
TR - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
TRACE - Enum constant in enum class minum.logging.LoggingLevel
Information marked as trace is pretty much entered for the same reason as DEBUG - i.e.
TRACK - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
type() - Method in record class minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode

U

U - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
UL - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
UnderInvestigation - Class in minum.security
Looking for bad actors in our system
UnderInvestigation(Constants) - Constructor for class minum.security.UnderInvestigation
 
update(T) - Method in class minum.database.Db
updates an element in the in-memory data structure by replacing the element having the same id if the data to update is not found, throw an exception update the data on disk with this id.
USE_VIRTUAL - Variable in class minum.Constants
If true, use the new Java "Project Loom" virtual threads instead of regular threads.

V

valueByKey(String) - Method in class minum.web.Headers
Allows a user to obtain any header value by its key.

values() - Method in class minum.database.Db
The primary way to analyze this data.
values() - Static method in enum class minum.htmlparsing.ParseNodeType
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class minum.logging.LoggingLevel
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

VAR - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
version() - Method in record class minum.web.StatusLine
Returns the value of the version record component.
VIDEO - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
VULN_SEEKING_JAIL_DURATION - Variable in class minum.Constants
If a client does something that we consider an indicator for attacking, put them in jail for a longer duration.

W

WBR - Enum constant in enum class minum.htmlparsing.TagName
 
WebEngine - Class in minum.web
This class contains the basic internet capabilities.
WebEngine(Context) - Constructor for class minum.web.WebEngine
 
WebEngine.HttpVersion - Enum Class in minum.web
 
WebFramework - Class in minum.web
Responsible for the logistics after socket connection
WebFramework(Context) - Constructor for class minum.web.WebFramework
This constructor is used for the real production system
WebFramework(Context, ZonedDateTime) - Constructor for class minum.web.WebFramework
This provides the ZonedDateTime as a parameter so we can set the current date (for testing purposes)
write(T) - Method in class minum.database.Db
writes new data to the in-memory data and persists it to disk
writeString(Path, String) - Static method in class minum.utils.FileUtils
Write a string to a path on disk.
writeTestReport() - Method in class minum.testing.TestLogger
Writes a Junit-style xml file to out/reports/tests/tests.xml

_

_200_OK - Enum constant in enum class minum.web.StatusLine.StatusCode
